game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept:
Congratulations. The October labor lottery is complete. Your name was pulled. For immediate placement, report to the Ministry of Admission at Grestin Border Checkpoint. An apartment will be provided for you and your family in East Grestin. Expect a Class-8 dwelling.

The Short Film


Watch the official short film based on the game.
By KINODOM PRODUCTIONS. Starring Igor Savochkin.


About the Game

Congratulations.
The October labor lottery is complete. Your name was pulled.
For immediate placement, report to the Ministry of Admission at Grestin Border Checkpoint.
An apartment will be provided for you and your family in East Grestin. Expect a Class-8 dwelling.
Glory to Arstotzka


The communist state of Arstotzka has just ended a 6-year war with neighboring Kolechia and reclaimed its rightful half of the border town, Grestin.

Your job as immigration inspector is to control the flow of people entering the Arstotzkan side of Grestin from Kolechia. Among the throngs of immigrants and visitors looking for work are hidden smugglers, spies, and terrorists.

Using only the documents provided by travelers and the Ministry of Admission's primitive inspect, search, and fingerprint systems you must decide who can enter Arstotzka and who will be turned away or arrested.
game_info.description: You are an immigration inspector at the Grestin Border Checkpoint for Arstotzka. Your job is to process travelers entering the country by examining their documents for discrepancies. Check passports against entry permits, verify expiration dates, confirm ID numbers match, and ensure issuing cities are valid. Approve legitimate travelers and deny those with invalid documents. Process enough people correctly to meet your daily quota and earn your wage. Glory to Arstotzka!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate through documents and UI elements
Space: Approve traveler / Select option
Z: Deny traveler / Cancel
Shift: Inspect/Compare documents closely
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart to main menu

TEST_1.test_description: Testing basic document inspection and approval workflow. This validates that the game can correctly identify valid documents and process approvals successfully.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Systematically inspect each traveler's documents. Check passport details against entry permits. Verify all dates, ID numbers, and issuing cities match and are valid. Approve travelers with correct documents and deny those with discrepancies.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The test should successfully process multiple travelers, correctly identifying valid and invalid documents. Score should increase with correct decisions. Test passes when quota is met and GAME_OVER_WIN state is reached.

TEST_1.expected: The test should successfully process multiple travelers, correctly identifying valid and invalid documents. Score should increase with correct decisions. Test passes when quota is met and GAME_OVER_WIN state is reached.

TEST_2.test_description: Testing optimal strategy to win the game efficiently. This validates the win condition can be achieved through skilled play.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Quickly scan documents for common discrepancies: expiration dates, mismatched ID numbers, invalid cities, and missing permits. Make rapid but accurate decisions to maximize correct processing rate and meet quota before time runs out.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Should achieve high accuracy rate (>85%) and process required number of travelers within time limit. Win condition triggers when quota met with acceptable accuracy. Test successful on GAME_OVER_WIN.

TEST_3.test_description: Testing document comparison and discrepancy detection mechanics. Validates that the inspection system correctly identifies various types of document errors.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Focus on using the inspect mode (Shift key) to carefully compare documents side-by-side. Test detection of date mismatches, ID number discrepancies, city validation, and missing documentation scenarios.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Successfully identify and deny travelers with incorrect documents. Verify that penalty system works correctly for wrong decisions. Test passes when multiple discrepancy types are correctly identified without excessive errors.
